artPrompt: A dramatic moment as four scrappy red goblin voters burst from a polling tent into the feral town square, brandishing skewered hot dogs like torches and whooping, sparks and confetti raining down around them. Overturned ballot boxes and a roaring bonfire frame the surge, torn blank bunting whipping overhead. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, riotous civic enthusiasm, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Get Out the Vote
text:
Create four 1/1 red Voter creature tokens.
Mandate — If you control a Mayor, instead roll a six-sided die and create that many 1/1 red Voter creature tokens. (Turnout was higher than expected.)
flavorText: Free hot dogs at the polling place. Strictly nonpartisan hot dogs.
